name: Ridgeview Park Pickleball Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Ridgeview Park Pickleball Courts in Waynesboro, VA! There are 8 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. You can’t reserve the courts. Amenities include restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: Waynesboro Country Club
description: Waynesboro Country Club is a place to play pickleball in Waynesboro, VA. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights. A membership is required to play.

name: Waynesboro Family YMCA
description: Waynesboro Family YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Waynesboro, VA. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Amenities include lights. Reservations are available.
